channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: India to Hold All-Party Meeting Over Growing West Asia Crisis
item.description: The central government has called an urgent all-party meeting to discuss the escalating tensions in West Asia. This development comes in light of rising concerns about an LPG crisis and unstable marke...

item.title: Kim Jong Un confirms North Korea's nuclear stance, warns of severe consequences for South Korea
item.description: In a stern policy speech, North Korea's leader Kim Jong Un reiterated that his country will never abandon its nuclear weapons program, claiming it is now an irreversible step. Kim further declared tha...

item.title: Philippine Sports Hall of Fame welcomes its newest inductees
item.description: The Philippine Sports Hall of Fame is set to honor a new batch of outstanding athletes who have made significant contributions to Philippine sports. This initiative continues to celebrate the legacy o...

item.title: Survey reveals public concern over UK's war preparedness and calls for increased national resilience
item.description: A recent poll has highlighted growing concern among the UK public about the possibility of war within the next five years, with 40% of respondents believing a conflict could occur. More than two-third...

item.title: AWS Region in Bahrain Disrupted by Drone Activity, Second Incident in a Month
item.description: Amazon Web Services (AWS), the cloud computing arm of Amazon, has reported disruptions to its region in Bahrain due to drone activity. This marks the second time in just a month that AWS operations ha...

item.title: Woman Remains in Custody Pending Bail After Alleged NICU Assault and Prior Animal Cruelty Conviction
item.description: A 35-year-old woman, Lindsey Hirtreiter, remains in custody in Surrey after being arrested for allegedly mishandling babies in the neonatal intensive care unit (NICU) at Surrey's Memorial Hospital. Hi...

item.title: APC Screens Yilwatda and Other Aspirants in Preparation for 2026 Party Convention
item.description: The All Progressives Congress (APC) don carry out screening for its National Chairman, Professor Nentawe Yilwatda, and other aspirants ahead of the party’s 2026 National Convention. The screening, wey...

item.title: RCMP Surveillance of Indigenous Organizations Exposed After Decades of Secrecy
item.description: The CBC has uncovered a vast RCMP operation that spied on Indigenous organizations from 1968 to 1982, a program that had remained hidden for decades. The investigation reveals how over 150 police offi...

item.title: Pakistan Stock Exchange Sees Significant Recovery, KSE-100 Up Over 1,200 Points
item.description: The Pakistan Stock Exchange (PSX) experienced a remarkable turnaround on Tuesday, with the benchmark KSE-100 index recovering by over 1,200 points during intraday trading. The index climbed 1,245.93 p...

item.title: Thattanchavady sees a crucial contest between CM Rangasamy and ex-CM Vaithilingam in Puducherry assembly elections
item.description: The Thattanchavady constituency in Puducherry is set for a high-profile political battle in the upcoming assembly elections. The incumbent Chief Minister, N Rangasamy, will face off against former CM ...

item.title: Pakistan emerges as key mediator in proposed US-Iran talks after Trump's policy shift
item.description: Pakistan might host direct or mediated talks between the United States and Iran later this week as part of renewed diplomatic efforts to calm regional tensions. According to a CNN report, Washington i...

item.title: Man in Bengaluru Killed After Assault with Car Jack Rod
item.description: A tragic incident occurred in Bengaluru where a man was brutally beaten to death using a car's puncture jack rod. The assault was captured on camera, reportedly following a heated argument between the...

item.title: Delhi HC Dismisses Lalu Yadav’s Petition in Land-for-Jobs Scandal, Investigation to Continue
item.description: In a significant ruling, the Delhi High Court rejected RJD chief Lalu Prasad Yadav's petition to quash the CBI FIR in the ongoing land-for-jobs case, which alleges irregularities during his tenure as ...

item.title: Irvine Welsh's Trainspotting Becomes a Musical at the Theatre Royal Haymarket
item.description: Irvine Welsh's 1993 novel Trainspotting, a gritty tale of heroin addiction and urban decay, is being transformed into a musical, set to open at London's Theatre Royal Haymarket in July. Welsh himself ...

item.title: Why the ANC’s Leadership Challenges Go Beyond Individual Figures
item.description: Recent speculation about Patrice Motsepe potentially taking over as ANC president has sparked debate, but it underscores a deeper issue within the party: unresolved structural and ideological contradi...

item.title: The Shaggs: An Unusual Journey to Cult Musical Fame
item.description: The Shaggs, a band of sisters from Fremont, New Hampshire, became one of the most polarising acts in rock history. Their father, Austin Wiggin Jr, withdrew Dorothy, Betty, and Helen from school in the...

item.title: Ruto Consulted by US on Middle East Security and Kenya’s Role in Regional Peace
item.description: On Monday, President William Ruto held a discussion with US Secretary of State Marco Rubio regarding regional security issues, particularly focusing on the aims of Operation Epic Fury, a joint US-Isra...

item.title: Punjab Considers Energy-Saving Measures: School Closures & Market Restrictions
item.description: The Punjab government in Pakistan is seriously considering a range of measures to deal with a looming energy crisis stemming from disruptions to global fuel supplies due to the ongoing conflict in the...

item.title: Sindh Authorities Alerted for Heavy Rain and Thunderstorms Across Multiple Cities
item.description: KARACHI: The Sindh Provincial Disaster Management Authority (PDMA) has issued a warning for heavy rainfall and thunderstorms in Karachi and several other districts of Sindh, including Thatta, Badin, H...

item.title: Balendra Shah's Leadership in Nepal: Navigating Geopolitics and Domestic Challenges
item.description: After securing a historic mandate in Nepal's parliamentary elections, Balendra Shah, along with his Rastriya Swatantra Party (RSP), faces the challenge of navigating Nepal's complex geopolitical lands...
